title: The Volatile Addon | Made For Minecraft Backrooms Found Footage
description:
This mod is an addon to the mod: 

- Backrooms Found Footage from Space Potato

It adds a lot of stuff like new levels and mechanics!

This is a never expanding addon to the mod!
body:
![The Volatile Addon | A found footage addon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e616be39551b8307c05b2ef889f10936fa9ba7e1_0.webp)

Welcome to **the Volatile Addon**, an never ending expansion for **[Space Potato's Found Footage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-found-footage)** that drags you even deeper into the true horrors of the Backrooms. This is not a safe update

**| Warning! | this Addon is still under developpement, it may contain bugs and errors!**

## Levels added to the found footage mod
> 1. **Level Kitty** --------------------------- A friendly level?
> 2. **Level 207 / a global interment** -------- Somethings off...
> 3. **Level run / !** --------------------------- I wish you good luck!
> 4. **The Broken** --------------------------- A Uncharted level made of pure glitch.

## **Key Features:**

> **Semi Survival Mechanics:**
> Add's thirst, sanity and a flashlight battery system to give off a more survival situations!

> **Semi/Lore-Accurate Levels:**
> Adds levels that was made semi acurate to the wiki's descriptions, entities are the same btw.

> **Overhaul Addon:**
> This stuff is looking good and i hope you will like it, if there are bugs ask away on the github.

> **Custom Entities:**
> Encounter new entities, each with cool behaviors and a few more cool stuff.


## **Credit**
- Made by DarkFox Studios
- Helped by [Herr Chaos](https://modrinth.com/user/Herr_Chaos)
